CVE-2020-24025.title: Certificate validation in node-sass 2.0.0 to 4.14.1 is disabled w ...
CVE-2020-24025.description: Certificate validation in node-sass 2.0.0 to 4.14.1 is disabled when requesting binaries even if the user is not specifying an alternative download path.

CVE-2022-25758.description: All versions of package scss-tokenizer are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via the loadAnnotation() function, due to the usage of insecure regex.
